layout_observations: Dark-mode-default chrome: page background rgb(23,23,28) — no light-theme variant served at root navigation.
Two-pane composition on stock detail: chart/price panel + order panel (right rail).
Headings use neutral grey (rgb(195,195,198)) — chromatic colour is reserved for state (up/down) and brand (CTA blue).
No box-shadow on cards or buttons — depth comes from layered surface alphas + 1px translucent borders.
Chip/pill memo control radius=32px contrasts with 8px card/input radius — two-tier radius family.

Toss Securities ships a real internal DS — 416 CSS custom props on :root with three namespaces (--tw-semantic-*, --tw-adaptive-*, --wts-adaptive-*) implying a Tailwind-token + adaptive-theme + Web-Toss-Securities-specific scale.
tone_observed: Calm, restrained dark-mode product chrome; chromatic colour reserved as semantic signal (red=up, blue=down, blue=brand CTA — semantic overlap accepted because contexts differ: brand button vs price tick).
data_first_density: High — order book, price feed, real-time chart all fit a single viewport; type hierarchy keeps 16px body baseline.
